title: plectranthus igniarius
intro: Plectranthus igniarius, also known as Fire or Flame Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus igniarius include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Plectranthus igniarius can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
